mdtools.success_summary: The agent completed the subsection relocation with dual-scorer agreement after using Markdown-aware section/block operations.

hybrid.success_summary: The agent completed the same scoped subsection relocation with dual-scorer agreement, using a longer mixed strategy.

unix.failure_summary: The agent maxed out without producing the required structural relocation. Dual scorers found the document still had the original heading order, with Database Configuration remaining under System Configuration and absent from the required position under Server Setup.

gap.promotion_required: Candidate remains staged pending cross-seed stability, dual-scorer confirmation across seeds, and promotion-gate review.
